message:
refactor(mvcc,harness,deps): adopt VersionGuardTicket API, relativize dep paths, and apply rustfmt

- Replace VersionGuard::pin() with VersionGuardTicket::register() in
  MVCC lifecycle and remove unnecessary manual unsafe Send/Sync impls
  on VersionGuardTicket (the type auto-derives both from Arc + integers)
- Convert absolute /dp/ dependency paths to relative workspace references
  for ftui, asupersync (root Cargo.toml), and promote asupersync to
  workspace dep in fsqlite-harness and fsqlite-pager
- Apply rustfmt across all harness source modules (~15 files) and test
  files (~14 files): function signature wrapping, assert macro expansion,
  import reordering, iterator chain formatting
- Add missing semicolon after return Err(...) in tcl_conformance.rs
- Alphabetically sort mod declarations in harness lib.rs
- Sync beads issue tracker with current status updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
